description: Resource schema for AWS::MediaPackage::HarvestJob. A HarvestJob extracts a video on demand (VOD) clip from a live content stream.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the HarvestJob.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the HarvestJob.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ChannelId.description: The ID of the Channel that the HarvestJob will harvest from.
ChannelId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the Channel that the HarvestJob will harvest from.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreatedAt.description: The date and time the HarvestJob was submitted.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The date and time the HarvestJob was submitted.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

EndTime.description: The end of the time-window which will be harvested.
EndTime.markdownDescription:
The end of the time-window which will be harvested.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

Id.description: The ID of the HarvestJob. The ID must be unique within the region and it cannot be changed after the HarvestJob is submitted.
Id.markdownDescription:
The ID of the HarvestJob. The ID must be unique within the region and it cannot be changed after the HarvestJob is submitted.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

OriginEndpointId.description: The ID of the OriginEndpoint that the HarvestJob will harvest from.
OriginEndpointId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the OriginEndpoint that the HarvestJob will harvest from.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

StartTime.description: The start of the time-window which will be harvested.
StartTime.markdownDescription:
The start of the time-window which will be harvested.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

Status.description: The current status of the HarvestJob.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status of the HarvestJob.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: IN_PROGRESS | SUCCEEDED | FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

S3Destination.description: Configuration parameters for where in an S3 bucket to place the harvested content.

BucketName.description: The name of an S3 bucket within which harvested content will be exported.
BucketName.markdownDescription:
The name of an S3 bucket within which harvested content will be exported.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

ManifestKey.description: The key in the specified S3 bucket where the harvested top-level manifest will be placed.
ManifestKey.markdownDescription:
The key in the specified S3 bucket where the harvested top-level manifest will be placed.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

RoleArn.description: The IAM role used to write to the specified S3 bucket.
RoleArn.markdownDescription:
The IAM role used to write to the specified S3 bucket.

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
